commands.review_summary:
The PR constrains Gateway Access grid/control CSS, adds a CSS regression test and changelog entry, and changes archived-session refresh calls to pass the boolean state default.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: constrained Gateway Access widths combine fixed grid track minima with native input/select sizing that lacks access-specific shrink and width containment. I did not live-render the browser layout, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
